answer:
The young man from the coffee shop does not manifest himself to Bill following his accident; instead, Death arrives at Bill's home in the body of that young man. Death explains that Bill's impassioned speech intrigued him, and he offers Bill more time in exchange for being his guide on Earth. This entity is then introduced to the family as "Joe Black."

\boxed{\text{Death arrives at Bill's home in the body of the young man from the coffee shop, introducing himself as "Joe Black."}}
